summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FASE H0 HRD Module (Employee Master, Org Units, HR Settings, ESS). Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: 16/16 core UI elements verified. All critical functionality working: RBAC (admin/manager full access, sales/warehouse 403), ESS (own record with full PII), Org Units CRUD (hierarchy, create dept/position, validation), Employees CRUD (list, filters, create, update, delete), PII redaction (admin sees full data), Settings (GET/PUT with permission checks), Multi-entity scoping (X-Entity-Id header).
passed_tests: Backend RBAC: admin & manager GET /api/hr/employees returns 200 with employee list
Backend RBAC: sales & warehouse GET /api/hr/employees returns 403 (no hr permission)
Backend RBAC: sales GET /api/hr/settings returns 403
Backend ESS: sales GET /api/hr/employees/me returns 200 with full PII (base_salary visible)
Backend Org Units: GET /api/hr/org-units returns flat list with departments and positions
Backend Org Units: GET /api/hr/org-units/tree returns hierarchy with employee_count
Backend Org Units: POST /api/hr/org-units creates department with auto-generated code
Backend Org Units: POST /api/hr/org-units creates position with parent_id
Backend Org Units: POST /api/hr/org-units position without parent_id returns 400
Backend Employees: GET /api/hr/employees with department_id filter works
Backend Employees: GET /api/hr/employees with status filter works
Backend Employees: GET /api/hr/employees with search query works
Backend Employees: POST /api/hr/employees creates with auto-generated EMP-NNNNN code
Backend Employees: GET /api/hr/employees/{id} returns employee detail
Backend Employees: PATCH /api/hr/employees/{id} updates employee data
Backend Employees: user_id linking validation returns 409 if already linked
Backend PII: admin sees base_salary (not redacted, pii_redacted=false)
Backend Settings: GET /api/hr/settings returns merged config with payroll_commission_mode=accrue_then_settle
Backend Settings: PUT /api/hr/settings as admin returns 200
Backend Settings: PUT /api/hr/settings as manager returns 403 (no manage_settings)
Backend Summary: GET /api/hr/summary returns total_employees, active, by_status, by_type, linked_accounts, org_units, departments
Backend Multi-entity: X-Entity-Id header scoping works (ent_ksc: 9 employees, ent_kanda: 1 employee)
Backend Employees: DELETE /api/hr/employees/{id} soft deletes to status=resigned
Backend Org Units: DELETE /api/hr/org-units/{id} with active children returns 400
Frontend Login: admin login successful
Frontend Navigation: HRD group (nav-group-toggle-hrd) found and expandable
Frontend Navigation: Karyawan nav item (nav-hr-employees) found
Frontend Navigation: Struktur Organisasi nav item (nav-hr-org-units) found
Frontend Navigation: Standalone Profil Saya nav item (nav-hr-my-profile) found
Frontend Employees: employees-view loads successfully
Frontend Employees: Summary stat cards (stat-total-employees, stat-active-employees, stat-departments, stat-linked-accounts) displayed
Frontend Employees: Search input (employee-search) found
Frontend Employees: Department filter (employee-filter-dept) found
Frontend Employees: Status filter (employee-filter-status) found
Frontend Employees: Employee table rows displayed (10 employees found)
Frontend Employees: Create button (create-employee-button) found
Frontend Employees: Search functionality works (search 'Budi' returned 1 result)
Frontend Employees: Employee form drawer opens (employee-form-drawer)
Frontend Employees: Name input field found in drawer (employee-name-input)
Frontend Org Units: org-units-view loads successfully
Frontend Org Units: Create department button (create-department-button) found
Frontend Org Units: Org tree (org-tree) displayed
Frontend Org Units: Department cards (org-dept-*) found (5 departments)
Frontend Org Units: Position cards (org-position-*) found under departments
